problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
